scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env FINLEDGE_MODE=development powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { . .\\venv\\Scripts\\Activate.ps1; uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 }"
scripts.dev:backend:reload: cross-env FINLEDGE_MODE=development powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { . .\\venv\\Scripts\\Activate.ps1; uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 }"
scripts.desktop-dev: cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 FINLEDGE_MODE=development FINLEDGE_BACKEND_PORT=8001 FINLEDGE_FRONTEND_PORT=5174 VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8001 npm start --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop-build: cross-env FINLEDGE_MODE=production FINLEDGE_BACKEND_PORT=8000 VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 npm run build --prefix frontendwebapp && npm run build --prefix desktop
